title: eragrostis montana
intro: Eragrostis montana, also known as Mountain Lovegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eragrostis montana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used topically to treat minor skin issues.
